title: Izzi Software Acquires CNX Corporation, Extends Reach into IBM Power Ecosystem MINNEAPOLIS, July 07, 2025--Izzi Software, a leading provider of innovative enterprise software solutions, is pleased to announce the acquisition of Chicago-based CNX Corporation, a technology company specializing in accelerating app development for users of IBM Power Systems. This strategic move marks a significant milestone for Izzi as it expands its capabilities and offerings into the IBM Power ecosystem.
